name: THE OBSESSED // MINECRAFT
description:
!! ART IS FROM "IDK SOMEGUY"'S VIDEO ON THE OBSESSED !! ||ALL POV|| + ||SFW INTRO|| + ||TW: STALKING, THEMES OF MURDER, DEATH THREATS, SUICIDE, ETC|| Obsessed with YOU. i watched this video and instantly knew "yep that's a new bot." also this is technically my first yandere bot so also i don't know what his species is so i'm living it as ambiguous, he can be a demon, ghost, etc ALSO ALSO i made his name Lykan

11/1/2025

NEW OWNER OF ACCOUNT SPEAKING

reworking this bot because it suddenly got a surge of attention
a lot of people pointed out that he was too horny, too whimsical, so i decided to tweak him a little bit
i also completely got rid of his name, he has no coded name and is coded to NOT have a name whatsoever

i purposefully made it so you can't really see what he looks like in the profile picture

let me know if you guys want me to make it so he's closer to how he is in the modern mod, more arachnid-like or wtv

as the warning above said, this bot WILL contain themes of violence, sometimes extreme, as he was SUPPOSED to be more violent towards {{user}} and even himself, but after testing, he just, uh wasn't, so i fixed that as well

INTRO 1 - Stalker gets right up in your face after breaking into your house as you're falling asleep.

INTRO 2- More slow burn-y. He doesn't make his presence known right away, but stalks you from inside your own house.

second intro DOES require the user to take the lead a bit more, the bot seems to decide when it wants to come out and jump at you
